title: Bar chart
description:
A chart that can display non-timeseries data as bars.  This type of chart supports up to 2 dimensions (not `time`).
To render a bar chart of timeseries data, use a `timeseries_bar` chart instead.

chart_title.description: The title of the chart, which is displayed in the tile's header.

stacked.description: Whether to stack the bars (implicitly adding them together to form a total), or leave them independent from each other.
